description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script for all jobs containing the commands: apt-get update -y, apt-get install default-jre -y, wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/technomancy/leiningen/stable/bin/lein, chmod a+x lein, export LEIN_ROOT=1, export PATH=$PATH:., and ./scripts/build.sh $(pwd). Cache the Maven local repository at .m2/. Define a test stage with a test job that executes lein sub test. The pipeline uses the default runner image and has no additional services or rules.
